body: import java.nio.charset.IllegalCharsetNameException;

translation: assert isinstance(e, Exception), "org.apache.commons.codec.net.BCodec cannot be decoded using BCodec"
assert isinstance(e, Exception), "Objects of type org.apache.commons.codec.net.BCodec cannot be encoded using BCodec"
assert isinstance(e, DecoderException), "Expected DecoderException but got {}".format(type(e))
assert str(e) == "Objects of type java.lang.Object cannot be encoded using BCodec"
